title: SekiroDiedScreen
body:
This mod mimics the death screen from Sekiro.

This mod was separated from a project currently being developed by the author.

All content in the mod is localized and can be modified by creating your own resource packs.

Does not support Hardcore Mode.

![gif](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExeHppdm92NHRlZGVsemc1MXNkNHM3N3ljamFoYW1lMnI0cHdzbzg1YiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/TPITJ6DDiK6yPNfqrg/giphy.gif)
